heading: Change of location of land offices
label: 126 Change of location of land offices
text: The President is authorized to change the location of the land offices in the several land districts established by law, and to relocate the same from time to time at such point in the district as he deems expedient.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2251 derived from acts , ; , .Mar. 3, 1853, ch. 97, § 110 Stat. 204Mar. 3, 1853, ch. 14410 Stat. 244
